The '''''Renthal's Fist''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that served as the flagship of the pirate [[Drea Renthal]].

In addition to the standard armament of a CR90 corvette, the ''Renthal's Fist'' was equipped with a pair of capital ship grade [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedo]] launchers. While these weapons greatly enhanced the ship's firepower, the torpedoes were expensive and very difficult to acquire.

During the [[Battle of Nar Shaddaa (4 BBY)|Battle of Nar Shaddaa]], ''Renthal's Fist'' played an important role, being the largest of the ships in the smugglers' fleet and destroying the [[Neutron Star-class bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] [[Arrestor (Neutron Star-class)|''Arrestor'']]. After the battle, the ''Renthal's Fist'' was replaced by the ''[[Renthal's Vigilance]]'' as the fleet flagship, but remained in use and was present when Drea Renthal raided the ''[[Queen of Empire]]''.
